metadata.title: UAE EOR Services | Employer of Record UAE – Jackson & Frank
metadata.description: UAE EOR and Employer of Record UAE services. Hire employees in the UAE without a local entity. UAE labour law 2026, payroll, WPS, MOHRE work permits, medical insurance, EOS gratuity. Typical onboarding 2–4 weeks (visa-dependent). Book a demo.
keywords: hire employees in UAE without entity

faqs.title: UAE EOR FAQs
faqs.subtitle: Quick answers on cost, timeline, legal risks, and contracts for Employer of Record in the UAE.

items.question: How much does UAE EOR cost?
items.answer: UAE EOR pricing typically includes a monthly management fee per employee plus gross salary, mandatory medical insurance, visa and work permit costs, and any agreed allowances (e.g. housing, transport). At Jackson & Frank we offer transparent pricing. There is generally no personal income tax on employment income for individuals under standard UAE rules. Book a demo for a custom quote.

items.question: How fast can I hire someone in the UAE with EOR?
items.answer: Onboarding timelines depend on medical, work permit (MOHRE), and residence visa steps. Many employees go live within 2–3 weeks end-to-end; some cases are faster once documentation is complete. We coordinate approvals and WPS registration so payroll can start compliantly.

items.question: What are the legal risks of hiring in the UAE without an entity?
items.answer: Using a compliant UAE EOR, the EOR is the employer on record for labour and immigration purposes. That reduces risk of illegal work, WPS breaches, and misclassified arrangements. Always use a licensed provider familiar with mainland and free-zone rules.

items.question: What contract type does UAE EOR use?
items.answer: Employees are engaged under UAE-compliant employment contracts aligned with Federal Decree-Law on Labour Relations and applicable rules (mainland MOHRE or relevant free zone authority). Terms cover probation, notice, leave, gratuity accrual, and benefits as required.

items.question: Do you support work permits and residence visas?
items.answer: Yes. We coordinate medical fitness, work permit (labour card) processing with MOHRE or the relevant authority, Emirates ID, and residence visa issuance so employees can work legally in the UAE.
